title: How Banks and Credit Unions Can Power the Next Generation of Business Payments with Stablecoins
excerpt: Stablecoins are evolving from speculative assets into practical digital dollars for everyday business use. In this episode, we explore how companies are leveraging USDC
body:
Stablecoins are evolving from speculative assets into practical digital dollars for everyday business use. In this episode, we explore how companies are leveraging USDC for faster cross-border payments, more efficient treasury operations, and other real-world applications that go beyond traditional payment systems.

Tune in to the latest episode to learn how stablecoins are reshaping the future of business payments.
